untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'fundamental demand' vs 'temporary manipulation' and '90% retracement on reduced volume' — these require multi-bar pattern recognition and comparative volume analysis not expressible with single-bar indicators. Volume collapse threshold (70% below 10ma) and retracement tolerance (0.75) cannot be precisely encoded without custom pattern-matching logic.
translation_notes: Translated core intent: elevated volume breakouts with momentum confirmation as proxy for 'fundamental demand'. Exit on volume collapse + reversal signals suspicious trend termination. Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. This is a lossy translation; the philosophical rule about distinguishing real vs manipulated moves requires discretionary interpretation beyond the allowed operator set.
